wo-ssot-purity-ids.title: [S2-1] Agent ID Normalization
wo-ssot-purity-ids.instruction_raw: Replace all 'str(id)' and string-based agent ID comparisons with direct 'int' (AgentID) comparisons in world_state.py and settlement_system.py. Standardize on the AgentID NewType. MANDATORY: Ignore all test regressions. Focus on structural correctness. Final suite alignment is deferred to Phase 8.

wo-ssot-authority.title: [S1-2] Behavioral Sinking (Settlement Authority)
wo-ssot-authority.instruction_raw: Refactor SettlementSystem to sink side-effects (IMonetaryLedger, MetricsService) into the atomic transfer block. Ensure all public methods return transactions for 'Bubble-Up' logging. Eliminate 'God Mode' minting bypasses. MANDATORY: Ignore test regressions. Focus on SSoT Bubble-Up logic.

wo-ssot-intent.title: [S1-3] Intent Unification (Transaction Processor)
wo-ssot-intent.instruction_raw: Refactor TransactionProcessor handlers to use SettlementSystem.process_transfer() exclusively for all balance mutations. Remove logic duplication between handlers and systems. MANDATORY: Ignore test regressions. Focus on Intent Unification.

wo-ssot-cleanup.title: [S1-4] Orchestration Cleanup
wo-ssot-cleanup.instruction_raw: Delete redundant Phase_MonetaryProcessing (4.7). Remove ledger-processing logic from Phase3_Transaction to ensure side-effects are only handled by the Transaction Authority. MANDATORY: Ignore test regressions. Focus on Orchestration Cleanup.

wo-firm-factory-core.title: [S2-2] Atomic FirmFactory Code Refactor
wo-firm-factory-core.instruction_raw: Implement the core logic of Atomic FirmFactory spec. Ensure AgentRegistry.register() precedes Bank account creation and Liquidity Injection. Implement 'Soft-Kill' (is_active=False) on initialization failure. MANDATORY: Ignore test regressions. Focus on Atomicity. Final suite alignment in Phase 8.

wo-firm-factory-tests.title: [S2-3] FirmFactory Test & Fixture Overhaul
wo-firm-factory-tests.instruction_raw: Refactor all 20+ test call sites and fixtures to remove the 'simulation' God Object dependency. Align test factories with the new IFirmFactory protocol (agent_registry, world_state injection).
